PLAYLIST
PM Principles
Suer Yang  ·  10 tracks  ·  how I actually think
—
1
🚀
0→1 (feat. WeKruit)
Build from nothing. Ship before perfect. Iterate with users, not assumptions.
3:47
2
⭐
North Star
One metric to rule them all. If your team can't name it, it doesn't exist.
2:12
3
🔐
Escape Room Mode
Every product problem has a hidden constraint. Find it, and everything unlocks.
4:01
4
📊
Data Doesn't Lie (But It Misleads)
Always ask: what behavior does this metric fail to capture?
3:29
5
🤝
Stakeholder Alignment (Acoustic)
No PRD survives first contact with eng. Align early, align often, align in writing.
5:03
6
🧠
Prompt Engineering Is Product Work
The system prompt is your spec. The model is your eng team. Ship accordingly.
2:58
7
🔥
Kill Your Features (Extended Mix)
Every feature you don't build is tech debt you don't carry. Say no loudly and often.
3:15
8
🎙️
Voice of the User (Live)
Interviews are research, not validation. Listen for what they don't say.
4:44
9
⚡
Spicy Contrarian Take
Good PMs have opinions. Great PMs share them before the room agrees on the wrong thing.
1:57
10
🌟
Ship It (Don't Perfect It)
A good product in users' hands beats a perfect product in your backlog. Always.
2:33
